dataNote: Case timeline entries marked autoAdded are system-generated from ED press releases and Google News RSS. All other entries are human-curated from court records and agency filings.
latestUpdate: BJP government in first weeks: Tata return talks initiated, Ayushman Bharat rollout begun, 7th Pay Commission approved, DA arrears roadmap ordered, Annapurna Bhandar (formerly Lakshmir Bhandar) confirmed at ₹3,000/month. NEP fast-tracked. Electoral roll controversy: ECI's pre-election SIR drive deleted millions from rolls in Muslim-heavy constituencies.
sirControversy: ECI Special Intensive Revision (SIR) deleted millions of voter names citing 'logical discrepancies' — disproportionately in Muslim-majority constituencies. Analysts argue this narrowed margins in closely-contested seats.
teestaUpdate: With BJP now ruling Bengal, New Delhi has a clear path to negotiate long-stalled Teesta and Ganges water-sharing treaties with Bangladesh (now under BNP leadership).
